build_on: Cycle 004 audio zones + Narrative Agent #15 NPC anchors

voice_lines.text: Danger. Something large is moving through the eastern tree line. Listen — the birds have gone silent. When the birds go silent, you run.
The bones here are old — picked clean. Three kills in one place means this is a feeding ground. Do not camp here. Do not light fire here. Move before dark.

layers.note: Player should feel unease without consciously hearing a sound — Walter Murch principle

layers.description: Close stream with birds, Australian magpies
layers.freesound_name: Flowing stream close and fast, birds nearby.wav

layers.description: Loopable fast stream with birds background

layers.note: Cuts abruptly when large predator enters zone — silence = danger signal

audio_design_principles.silence_as_danger: Insect/bird audio cuts when apex predator within 500m — player learns silence = threat
audio_design_principles.sub_bass_presence: T-Rex footsteps add 40-60Hz sub-bass felt before heard — 80m radius
audio_design_principles.ambient_ducking: All ambient layers duck -12dB during voice playback, restore over 0.5s after
audio_design_principles.distance_attenuation: Voice lines: max 600cm, ambient: max 3000cm, sub-bass: max 8000cm

sync_points: AudioZone_KillSite_001 → VFX: dust particles + bone scatter on player approach
AudioZone_RiverCross_001 → VFX: water splash particles when player enters river
AudioZone_ForestNight_001 → VFX: firefly particles at night, fog density increase
AudioZone_SavannaWind_001 → VFX: grass particle wind direction matches audio wind layer
AudioVoice_Elder_Tracker_001 → VFX: subtle dust mote particles during NPC speech

screen_shake_spec.trex_footstep: Amplitude 2.5, Frequency 8Hz, Duration 0.4s — trigger at 1500cm from T-Rex
screen_shake_spec.raptor_impact: Amplitude 1.0, Frequency 15Hz, Duration 0.2s — trigger on raptor attack hit
screen_shake_spec.damage_flash: Red vignette overlay, alpha 0.6, fade 0.3s — trigger on any damage event
